name: My hand got crushed in a machine at work today, what do I do right now?
description: Go to ER now, tell employer, take photos, don't talk to insurance alone. Call a workers' comp lawyer today.

mainEntity.name: My hand got crushed in a machine at work today, what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Go to ER now, tell employer, take photos, don't talk to insurance alone. Call a workers' comp lawyer today.
acceptedAnswer.description: Seek immediate medical attention at the ER, even if it hurts a little, and report the injury to your employer before leaving.[1][4] Workers' comp covers machine accidents as workplace injuries, providing medical bills and wage replacement without proving fault.[2][7] Key factors: Document everything including photos of the machine and scene; don't sign anything from insurance yet; Utah requires reporting within 180 days but act fast.[8] Get a workers' comp attorney consult free to protect benefits. Preserve evidence like clothing and witness contacts. Consult a specialist soon to avoid claim denials.
